stories.title: French police probe suspected weather device tampering after odd Polymarket bet
stories.description: The incident is the latest eyebrow-raising bet on Polymarket, as allegations of rigging and manipulation continue to haunt the popular prediction market site.

stories.title: Airlines in Europe slash thousands of flights as Iran war cuts jet fuel supplies
stories.description: The soaring cost of jet fuel is forcing European airlines to cancel tens of thousands of flights, while energy authorities warned of a possible jet fuel shortage if supplies aren't replenished soon.

stories.title: Tensions rise in two ceasefires in the Middle East. And, the Navy secretary ousted
stories.description: Tensions are rising in the Middle East as shaky ceasefire agreements between the U.S., Israel and Iran, and Lebanon and Israel, are tested. And, the Secretary of the Navy is out of the role.

stories.title: Trump announces a 3-week extension of the Israel-Lebanon ceasefire
stories.description: President Trump said Thursday that Israel and Lebanon have agreed to extend their ceasefire for three weeks after the two sides met at the White House for a high-level negotiation.

stories.title: Peace talks between U.S. and Iran at a standstill as Trump extends ceasefire
stories.description: President Trump has extended the ceasefire, but Iran says it's not enough if the naval blockade is still in place.

stories.title: Couple discovers Lebanon home destroyed by Israel from satellite image
stories.description: Joe Elias contacted BBC Verify following reports that his village was among several destroyed by Israeli forces.

stories.title: US-Kuwaiti journalist held in Kuwait over social media posts acquitted, lawyers say
stories.description: Ahmed Shihab-Eldin reportedly faced charges, including spreading false information, after he re-posted images related to the Iran war.

stories.title: Lebanon accuses Israel of targeting journalist killed in air strike
stories.description: Lebanon's prime minister accused Israel of war crimes after IDF attacks on Red Cross vehicles also stopped rescuers from reaching the site.

stories.title: Iran says Strait of Hormuz cannot be opened due to ceasefire breaches
stories.description: Iran's chief negotiator says "violations" by the US and Israel make it impossible to open the strait.

stories.title: US and Iran in blockade standoff as Pakistan pushes for talks
stories.description: The mood in the Strait of Hormuz remains combustible despite Trump's ceasefire extension.

stories.title: Tracking ships under fire in the Strait of Hormuz
stories.description: Iran's top negotiator says it's "not possible to reopen" the strait due to "blatent violations" of US-Iran ceasefire.

stories.title: US and Iran 'locked in war of words' says Lyse Doucet
stories.description: The US confirmed on Tuesday night that the Vice-President's trip to Pakistan for a second round of peace talks has been cancelled.

stories.title: Iran says it has seized two ships in Strait of Hormuz after vessels attacked
stories.description: One of the cargo ships was 'heavily damaged' by Iranian forces, a British maritime agency reported on Wednesday.

stories.title: Trump buys time for Iran deal after frantic day of diplomacy
stories.description: The US president's decision marked the second time in as many weeks he has backed off a threat to escalate the war, buying more time.

stories.title: Iran sees mass redundancies from war with US and Israel
stories.description: The impact is being felt by manufacturers, retailers and the digital sector, amid warnings it could get worse if the war resumes.

stories.title: Lebanon - Israel: Truce extended by three weeks
stories.description: Israel and Lebanon have agreed to extend a ceasefire for three weeks, according to the White House, which hosted ambassadors from both countries, but fighting persists as Hezbollah, absent from the talks, has launched new waves of rockets and drones, while Israeli forces continue...

stories.title: Strait of Hormuz: Iran, US seize ships
stories.description: US President Donald Trump says he is not rushing into a peace agreement with Iran, downplaying concerns over Iranian small boats even after they seized two container ships in the Strait of Hormuz, and arguing that Tehran is unable to strike a deal due to divisions within its lead...

stories.title: Israel, Lebanon extend ceasefire as Trump says ‘great chance’ for peace deal
stories.description: Israel and Lebanon extended their ceasefire by three weeks on Thursday following a meeting of officials from both sides at the White House. US President Donald Trump said he believed there was a "great chance" the two countries would agree on a peace deal, even though Israel and ...

stories.title: Trump says Israel and Lebanon have agreed to extend ceasefire by three weeks
Trump, Iran both share false information about eight women facing execution
stories.description: On Wednesday, Donald Trump claimed that out of respect for him, Iran had agreed to spare the lives of eight young Iranian women facing execution. But he was quickly struck with accusations that the images of the women were AI-generated. Iran itself gave conflicting information, b...

stories.title: Lebanon leaders accuse Israel of war crime after journalist killed
stories.description: Lebanon's president and prime minister accused Israel on Thursday of a war crime, after an airstrike killed a Lebanese journalist in the country's south, where Israeli forces occupy several areas. Rescuers and the reporter's employer on Wednesday confirmed the death of Amal Khali...

stories.title: Israel defense minister says awaiting US green light to 'return Iran to Stone Age'
stories.description: Defence minister Israel Katz said on Thursday that Israel was "prepared to resume the war against Iran", adding that his country was awaiting a green light from the United States to return Iran to "the Stone Age". FRANCE 24's Noga Tarnopolsky reports from Jerusalem.

stories.title: Iran flaunts its grip over the Strait of Hormuz with commandos storming cargo ship
stories.description: Reporting from Tehran, FRANCE 24's correspondent Reza Sayah explains that "the arena has shifted from Iran, from the Gulf States, from Israel to the Persian Gulf, to the Strait of Hormuz" adding that "the greater strategy, the greater objective seems to be to create as much econo...

stories.title: US says Iran can play at 2026 World Cup but bars those with ‘IRGC ties’
stories.description: US Secretary of State Marco Rubio says the US has not told the Iranian national team that it cannot play.

stories.title: The story Tehran wants you to read
stories.description: A new narrative about Iran’s leadership mistakes continuity for change - and echoes the regime’s own preferred framing.

stories.title: Does Israel’s ‘Yellow Line’ violate the Lebanon ceasefire?
stories.description: Israel has carved out a military zone inside southern Lebanon, raising fears it is replicating the “Yellow Line” in Gaza

stories.title: Trump’s May 1 deadline: Can he continue war on Iran after that?
stories.description: Trump is obliged under the War Powers Act to limit the conflict after 60 days with congressional approval.

stories.title: Iran war: What’s happening on day 56 after Trump extended ceasefire?
stories.description: The Israel-Lebanon ceasefire is extended by three weeks after White House talks with Israeli and Lebanese envoys.

stories.title: How fake AI victims are being used to provide rationale for attacking Iran
stories.description: In the battle of propaganda, fake videos and images of female victims of Iran's government are going viral.

stories.title: Oil rises above $106 per barrel as US, Iran deadlocked in Strait of Hormuz
stories.description: Jump in prices comes as Donald Trump says vessels will need permission of US Navy to transit key waterway.

stories.title: Iran war live: Lebanon truce extended; Trump says time not on Tehran’s side
stories.description: Death toll from Israel's ongoing genocidal war on Gaza has reached 72,568 with 172,338 wounded: Gaza's Health Ministry.

stories.title: Trump rules out N-option amid Hormuz struggle

stories.title: Pakistan rejects Indian propaganda on Pahalgam attack, deplores 'weaponisation of false narrative'
stories.description: Pakistan rejected Indian propaganda linking it to the 2025 Pahalgam attack on Thursday, deploring that the neighbouring country was focusing on “weaponising its false narrative” in the midst on an ongoing regional crisis. The April 22, 2025 attack in Pahalgam saw 26 people, mostl...

stories.title: US Navy Secretary Phelan fired by Pentagon, say sources
stories.description: Navy Secretary John Phelan has been fired, a US official and a person familiar with the matter said on Wednesday, in another wartime shakeup at the Pentagon coming just weeks after Defence Secretary Pete Hegseth ousted the Army’s top general. The Pentagon announced his departure ...

stories.title: AI startup Cursor with Pakistani co-founder set for $60bn deal with SpaceX
stories.description: Cursor, an AI code-generation startup co-founded by Pakistani-born Sualeh Asif, has secured a $60 billion acquisition deal with Elon Musk’s SpaceX, according to multiple reports on Thursday. Along with OpenAI and Anthropic, Cursor is one of several Silicon Valley startups that ha...

stories.title: Israeli airstrike kills journalist in south Lebanon: civil defence
stories.description: An Israeli airstrike killed a Lebanese journalist and wounded another on Wednesday while they were working near the border with Israel, according to their employer and rescuers. The civil defence agency’s press office said rescuers were “able to recover the body of martyred journ...

stories.title: Lebanon, Israel to meet today as truce hangs by a thread
stories.description: • Envoys’ meeting in Washington aims to extend ceasefire, halt Israel’s demolitions• Beirut sees extension as first step to talks on forces’ withdrawal, return of detainees• Israeli strikes kill five in Lebanon, including a journalist WASHINGTON: Lebanese and Israeli envoys are s...

stories.title: Trump says U.S. in no rush but 'clock is ticking' for Iran
stories.description: Mr. Trump, who on April 23, 2026, ruled out the use of a nuclear weapon against Iran, had earlier ordered the U.S. Navy to destroy any Iranian boat caught laying mines in Hormuz

stories.title: Israel-Iran war LIVE: West Asia's swift return to stability 'in everyone's interest', says Macron
stories.description: Israel says it struck a Hezbollah missile launcher soon after Trump said the Israel-Lebanon ceasefire had been extended by three weeks

stories.title: Pakistan repays $3.45 billion loan to UAE
stories.description: The UAE had asked for the immediate return of the funds in the wake of the recent situation in West Asia following the U.S.-Israel war on Iran

stories.title: West Asia conflict could cause 120 bcm of LNG supply loss from 2026-2030, says International Energy Agency
stories.description: LNG supply growth came to a halt in March after the closure of the Strait of Hormuz, which effectively reduced ‌the combined LNG production of Qatar and ​the United Arab Emirates by around 10 bcm for the month

stories.title: EU formally approves Ukraine loan and 20th sanctions package against Russia
stories.description: Economists had said Ukraine would start to run out of money by June if the EU loan was not disbursed by then

stories.title: Islamabad remains shut for heavy traffic amid uncertainty over U.S.-Iran talks
stories.description: The administrations of the twin cities of Islamabad and Rawalpindi had closed all major roads and markets in VVIP movement areas on April 19, 2026 amid indications that the talks could begin any day during the week

stories.title: Israeli army strikes Hezbollah facilities in southern Lebanon in response to attack
stories.description: According to the military, the attacks targeted "military structures" in the areas of Kherbet Selem and Touline in southern Lebanon

stories.title: Aoun, Netanyahu may arrive in Washington within 3 weeks — Trump
stories.description: The US President confirmed that Israel and Lebanon had agreed to extend the ceasefire for three weeks

stories.title: US considers strikes on Iranian targets in Strait of Hormuz — CNN
stories.description: According to the TV channel, potential US targets could include the Islamic republic’s mine-laying vessels and fast attack craft

stories.title: EU resorts to coercion of sovereign states in 20th sanctions package — Russian mission
stories.description: "The European Union has once again demonstrated its complete disregard for international law and the UN Charter," the Russian Mission to the EU said
